name.en: International Cargo Transportation and Parcel Delivery Service

description.en: Groupage, full-trailer and parcel streams from the UK timed to vessel or ro-ro cut-offs, with milestone tracking through departure, main carriage and Turkish handover.

keyword.en: UK Turkey LTL FTL groupage, linehaul cut-off parcels, Hanbros UK tracking

text.en:
Chargeable weight rules apply to air-style parcels; road groupage uses load metres and weight together. Batteries, aerosols and magnetised parts need separate approvals—declare them on the first call, not at the gate.

Hanbros UK sequences UK collection, feeder if needed, and mainline booking so paperwork and physical cargo reach the cut-off together.

title.en: Road cargo & parcels UK–Turkey | Hanbros UK
